backend.changelog: Diagnostic launch-timing instrumentation for Generate: the browser console now logs a detailed breakdown of the 'assembly loaded - generation starts' window (pre-flight checks + SolidWorks open/load/engage). No change to generation behaviour.

cadBridge.changelog: Diagnostic timing instrumentation: the Generate timing summary now splits the setup phase into 'foreign-doc cleanup' vs 'BOM-root open/activate' so large-assembly launch time can be attributed. No change to generation behaviour.
